notes: This file is owned by Agent 08 only.
Structure nests rounds inside sprints to keep history organized.

sprint_meta.notes: WK20 R2: Ursina mouse → fixed 1080p virtual engine.screen

what_i_changed: game/ursina_input_manager.py: Implemented get_mouse_pos() — inverse of Ursina mouse.Mouse (window.aspect_ratio, window.size), then linear scale to virtual framebuffer (default 1920×1080 per PM). Optional constructor virtual_screen_size=(1920,1080).
Constants: _DEFAULT_VIRTUAL_SCREEN aligned with GameEngine headless_ui surface.
how_to_test: Run Ursina viewer; move cursor to corners — HUD hit tests should align with stretched camera.ui quad (manual).
With KINGDOM_URSINA_DEBUG_INPUT=1 (Agent 12), verify printed coords vs expected virtual pixels.

sprint_meta.notes: WK22 R1: SPRINT-BUG-004 hotkeys in Ursina

what_i_changed: game/ursina_input_manager.py: Added ursina_key_to_input_event() — maps Ursina input() strings to KEYDOWN/WHEEL (matches PygameInputManager generic keys); extended _URSINA_KEY_MAP for esc/space/tab/symbols.
game/graphics/ursina_app.py: _handle_ursina_input no longer drops all keys after F12/LMB; queues converted events so tick_simulation → process_events → handle_keydown receives hotkeys.
how_to_test: python main.py --renderer ursina — press 1–8, h, b, esc, tab, f3, mouse wheel zoom — should match pygame behavior.
blockers: Chat typing in Ursina still expects pygame raw_event on KEYDOWN; not fixed in this ticket.

round_meta.build_target: WK22 R3 Ursina HUD crisp + bounty click

what_i_changed: game/graphics/ursina_app.py: _force_nearest_texture_filter on HUD composite Texture (filtering=None); pointer routing treats HUD layout chrome as UI so low-alpha pixels (icons) still get virtual 1920×1080 coords; sync engine._last_ui_cursor_pos from Ursina mouse before render_pygame.
game/ui/hud.py: _layout_rects_for_screen + virtual_pointer_in_hud_chrome(); CommandBar/SpeedBar use game_state ui_cursor_pos.
game/ui/command_bar.py: render(..., mouse_pos=) for Ursina (pygame.mouse dummy).
game/engine.py + game/input_handler.py: _last_ui_cursor_pos + get_game_state ui_cursor_pos; handle_mousemove updates cursor.
how_to_test: python main.py --renderer ursina — HUD text/icons should look sharp (nearest-neighbor), Bounty command button click should place bounty / match hotkey B.

round_meta.build_target: WK22 R3 PM: resize pygame HUD to Ursina window — native font raster

what_i_changed: game/display_manager.py: DisplayManager.apply_headless_ui_canvas_size(engine,w,h) — recreates engine.screen/_scaled_surface/_pause_overlay, HUD + panels on_resize, building_panel/debug_panel dimensions, clamp_camera; no pygame.display.set_mode (SDL dummy).

game/graphics/ursina_app.py: _sync_headless_ui_canvas_to_window() each frame from window.size; UrsinaInputManager.set_virtual_screen_size; invalidate HUD GPU texture when dimensions change; _hud_prefers_nearest_pixel_filter always True (1:1 texels).
game/ursina_input_manager.py: set_virtual_screen_size().
how_to_test: python main.py --renderer ursina — drag window corner; HUD should re-layout at new pixel size (not stretched 1080p).

what_i_changed: game/input_handler.py: _clear_hero_selection — chat end, engine.micro_view.exit_hero_focus(), then selected_hero=None; ESC in HERO_FOCUS matches that order.
game/ui/hud.py: chat_panel hit-testing in HERO_FOCUS uses bottom-half rect (matches render); exit_hero_focus from micro_view maps to end_conversation.
game/ui/pause_menu.py: Controls column uses chat_panel._wrap_text; audio uses Slider.hit_test_interactive; Graphics page Ursina note; render(..., mouse_pos) for virtual UI cursor.
game/ui/widgets.py: Slider.hit_test_interactive (track + thumb, vertical padding).
game/engine.py: pause_menu.render passes get_game_state ui_cursor_pos when available.
game/ui/pause_menu.py: Removed Unicode ►/■ from Resume/Quit labels (default pygame font → tofu in Ursina HUD); labels are plain "Resume" / "Quit" (icons unchanged).

game/ui/pause_menu.py: While visible and engine._ursina_viewer, set engine._ursina_hud_force_upload so row-sampled HUD CRC cannot skip GPU upload when only upper modal rows change (fixes missing hover highlight on first menu buttons).
how_to_test: python main.py --renderer ursina --provider mock — open ESC menu; hover Resume and Graphics; both should use hover texture like Audio; Resume text has no junk glyph before "Resume".

sprint_meta.notes: WK51 r6: Pin toggle visible above HeroPanel header fill

what_i_changed: game/ui/hud.py: When a hero is selected, render HeroPanel first, then WK51 pin toggle and left close chrome so the HeroPanel header band no longer paints over them.

what_i_changed: game/ui/hud.py: _render_pin_button now uses cached pygame.font.SysFont chain (segoeuiemoji / Segoe UI / Noto Color Emoji / arial) to render U+1F4CC pushpin emoji; pinned = full-alpha blit centered in pin_button_rect, unpinned = copy with alpha 128; fallback to existing circle+P if font missing or glyph width<=4.

wk52_r5_corner_layout.chevron_root_cause: (a) Layout recompute: WATCH_CARD_FULL_H grew to 352 and bottom-anchored minimap; _effective_watch_card_h caps watch-card height with min_top = top_bar + HERO_LEFT_MIN_H so left_h = card_top - top_h never collapses to 0 when toggling expanded — Heroes panel keeps a minimum readable column. Not (b) input pass-through (already consumed), not (c) expand flag listeners, not (d) render order.

wk52_r6_chat_polish.chat_render_root_cause: (a) In-card path called ChatPanel.render only when is_active(); otherwise render_idle_dock painted a flat dark fill with no placeholder or history/input chrome. Full ChatPanel.render was also unsuitable for the ~96px band (48px header + end button). Fix: dedicated render_watch_band() with divider, message area, and "> Type to chat…" placeholder when idle; compact history+input when conversation matches pinned hero.

Section dataclasses FixedSection/FlexSection reserved for stacked layouts.

wk52_r9_visual_iterate.building_display_name_path: game.ui.hud.building_display_name(building): optional callable get_display_name(); else display_name; else building_type resolved with getattr(bt, 'value', bt) so Python 3.12 str(Enum) never yields 'BuildingType.CASTLE' in the label; then replace('_',' ').title(). HUD._building_display_name delegates to this helper.

Matches input_handler world path that clears hero via _clear_hero_selection inside try_select_building.

Top-right of that band has a small dark rounded square with a light X fully on top; adjacent pixel left (213,807) reads brown (60,55,45) while button interior (218,808) reads card-dark (18,18,28) — X/chrome is not occluded by message fill.
observations.wk52_building_card.png: Header text reads 'Castle' in the purple header strip (not truncated Buildingtype). Card body shows only building stats (Type castle, HP bar) — no hero minimap, no two-column HP/XP grid, no chat band. Card right edge aligns with minimap; sampling y≈800 shows InfoCard edge (70,65,90) at x≈223 and map green at x≥224 — width 224px. Left column above card is empty panel (no hero detail) matching cleared hero selection path.
